title: Rebuild 30 Delayed Troll Thread
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild 3.0 Delayed [Troll Thread] Post by BrikHaus » Tue Mar 30, 2010 4:18 pm Apparently there has been some serious infighting between Khara staff and Anno. So much fighting that production on 3.0 has crashed to a halt. For now it seems to be delayed indefinitely. Shit. I figured this would happen. What are they thinking? It's Anno's story, shouldn't they do whatever he wants? Maybe not, as this kind of thing seems to happen in Hollywood all the time. Edit: Here's the link: http://www.cinematoday.jp/page/N0017823?g_ref=twitter

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Mar 30, 2010 4:20 pm It's not April Fools yet.

[]: Re: Rebuild 3.0 Delayed Post by skikes » Tue Mar 30, 2010 4:21 pm BrikHaus wrote: Apparently there has been some serious infighting between Khara staff and Anno. So much fighting that production on 3.0 has crashed to a halt. For now it seems to be delayed indefinitely. Shit. I figured this would happen. What are they thinking? It's Anno's story, shouldn't they do whatever he wants? Maybe not, as this kind of thing seems to happen in Hollywood all the time.

[]: Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Tue Mar 30, 2010 4:24 pm Got a link to verify?

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Mar 30, 2010 4:50 pm Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion wrote: Got a link to verify?

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Tue Mar 30, 2010 4:53 pm http://www.cinematoday.jp/page/N0017823?g_ref=twitter There is your damn link, Jesus. And no this isn't an April Fools Prank, because it's not April Fools.

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Mar 30, 2010 4:57 pm Nice random link from April 25th 2009 that has only to do with some general promotional 2.0 detail. Troll thread needs deleting before idiots start believing.

[]: Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Mar 30, 2010 5:03 pm I'm sorry BrikHaus, but without your Light Avatar, you are no longer shielded from modly rays.
